intro: The clearest split is that 1Password carries medium lock-in and Azure Key Vault carries low lock-in. 1Password is Secrets Management tool for developers; Azure Key Vault is Managed HSM and secrets service storing keys, certificates, and connection strings with Azure AD. The data points 1Password at teams with many api keys/tokens and ci/cd pipelines needing secure env vars, and Azure Key Vault at teams with many api keys/tokens and ci/cd pipelines needing secure env vars. Pricing: 1Password is subscription from $2.99; Azure Key Vault is subscription from $1. Lock-in is medium for 1Password and low for Azure Key Vault, with DX at 4/5 vs 4/5 and transparency at 5/5 vs 4/5. Both offer an enterprise tier for larger rollouts. Honest trade-off: neither fits solo, static projects, so if that is your context, look elsewhere; otherwise pick on the pivotal factor above and the DX score that matters most to your team.
quick_take: 1Password is for teams; Azure Key Vault is for teams; decide based on how much lock-in you tolerate.
verdict_a: Choose 1Password if you can accept medium lock-in in exchange for scope and your workload matches teams. Skip it if your context is solo, static projects.
verdict_b: Choose Azure Key Vault if you prefer low lock-in and easier exit and your workload matches teams. Skip it if your context is solo, static projects.

faq.q: Is 1Password cheaper than Azure Key Vault?
faq.a: Listed entry pricing is $2.99 for 1Password and $1 for Azure Key Vault. Both offer a free tier for getting started. Total cost at scale depends on usage and plan details that are not in this dataset, so confirm with each vendor.

faq.q: Can I migrate from 1Password to Azure Key Vault?
faq.a: 1Password is tagged with medium lock-in (items exportable to 1pux/json but deeply integrated workflows). Azure Key Vault is tagged with low lock-in (azure-bound secrets). Plan for SDK replacement, data export, and a parallel-run period; the dataset does not include migration tooling details.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, 1Password or Azure Key Vault?
faq.a: Both are rated 4/5 for developer experience in this dataset. With equal scores, the choice comes down to the specific SDK surface and docs you will use day to day. Run a short spike on each before deciding.

faq.q: Is Azure Key Vault a good alternative to 1Password?
faq.a: Yes for teams whose workload matches teams, since both list the same fit. Azure Key Vault is flagged as not for solo, static projects, so confirm your context does not fall there.
